nasb.text: but have walked after the stubbornness of their heart and after the Baals, as their fathers taught them,”

esv.text: but have stubbornly followed their own hearts and have gone after the Baals, as their fathers taught them.

cnv.text: 反而隨從自己頑梗的心行事，照他們列祖所教訓的，隨從眾巴力。”

ccb.text: 执迷不悟，随从他们祖先的教导去供奉巴力。”
